actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke PlayQuickSound.Play() to exercise AudioSource.PlayOneShot with randomized pitch. Expected: AudioSource.pitch is set to 1.0f +/- randomPitchVariance, PlayOneShot(sound, volume) is called, then pitch restored to default. Scene shows added component fileID 1865680030 likely corresponds to PlayQuickSound (GUID for PlayQuickSound not shown; only MonoBehaviour_0 id 1865680029 with GUID 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6 which appears to be a URP light data component). Requires an AudioSource present on the same GameObject and a non-null AudioClip bound to 'sound'.
